# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const authenticate = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  const cookieToken = req.cookies.token;

  if (authHeader && cookieToken) {
    // Check both headers and cookies for token validity
    return true;
  } else if (cookieToken) {
    // Use cookie token if no auth header is provided
    return true;
  }

  res.status(401).json({ message: 'Unauthorized' });
};

const authenticateMiddleware = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
  try {
    const authenticated = await authenticate(req, res);

    if (!authenticated) {
      throw new Error('Authentication failed');
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
  }

  return next();
};

export default authenticateMiddleware;
